mapper.select: select count(*) from members where email = #{email}
select count(*) from members where phone = #{phone}
select count(*) from members where nickname = #{nickname}
select terms_id, terms_type, version, title, content, is_required, is_active, created_at from terms where is_active = 1 order by is_required desc, terms_id asc
select terms_id, terms_type, version, title, content, is_required, is_active, created_at from terms where is_active = 1 and is_required = 1 order by terms_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into members ( email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, email_verified, phone_verified ) values ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{emailVerified}, #{phoneVerified} )

insert into member_terms_agreements ( member_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_at ) values ( #{memberId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, case when #{agreed} = 1 then CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') else null end )
